---
title: "CV"
---

Download [CV](files/CV/Fedor_Gerasimov_CV.pdf)

## Education

- Ph.D. in Mathematics, Rice University (expected 2028)
- Ph.D. in Computational Applied Mathematics and Operations Research (2023-2025)
- B.Sc. in Applied Mathematics and Computer Science, Moscow Institute of Physics and Technology (2019 --- 2023)


## Publications 

 [F. Gerasimov, A. Shutov "On An Interesting Circle in a Triangle"](https://old.mccme.ru//circles//oim/mmks/works2019/shutgera2.pdf) (2019)

## Awards

- **Russian National Mathematics Olympiad**, Silver Medal (2019)
